description: First issue-manager preflight fails → T2B aborts entire triage immediately (partial_failure_policy: abort_on_first_blocked).

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: T2B receives BLOCKED from first issue-manager → aborts before processing remaining failures
rubric_hints.output_structure: BLOCKED contract bubbled up to T2A → T1 (chained propagation per spec §3.7.1)
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: NN#4 hard-fail propagation; partial_failure_policy: abort_on_first_blocked enforced
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: No fixers dispatched; no diffs serialized; no escalation report (because abort is not exhaustion)
rubric_hints.error_propagation: BLOCKED contract is the canonical pipeline-blocker shape
